title: Mobile Frontend Baseline - Execution Plan
overview: Build the Flutter app scaffold with clean architecture, BLoC, and UI/UX screens. Ensure responsive design and animations.
prerequisites: Flutter SDK installed and in PATH.
Android Studio or Xcode for emulators.

steps.error_handling: If flutter command not found, install Flutter SDK. If directory exists, remove it first.

steps.description: Set up clean architecture folders: lib/app, lib/features, lib/core, lib/shared.
actions: Create folders and initial files (e.g., lib/core/bloc/, lib/features/home/).
steps.error_handling: Check file permissions; use mkdir if manual creation fails.

steps.description: Configure pubspec.yaml with BLoC, camera, animations dependencies.
actions: Add: flutter_bloc, camera, lottie, etc. Run: flutter pub get
steps.error_handling: If pub get fails, check internet; resolve version conflicts in pubspec.yaml.

steps.description: Implement main.dart with theme (resting colors), routing.
actions: Set up MaterialApp with custom theme, routes to Home, Camera, Results, Settings.
steps.error_handling: Fix syntax errors; ensure theme colors match examples in phase-1.json.

steps.description: Create screens with responsive layouts and animations.
actions: Settings: User prefs with smooth interactions.
steps.error_handling: Use Flutter dev tools to debug layout issues; ensure animations don't cause crashes.

actions: Create blocs for each feature, handle events/states.
steps.error_handling: Debug with BlocObserver; ensure events trigger correct states.
Check emulator setup; resolve build errors by updating dependencies.

steps.description: Evaluate audit report and create corrections.json.
actions: Create audits/phase-1/corrections.json with fixes for each issue.
steps.error_handling: If no issues, create empty array; ensure JSON syntax.
